# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        description: "Release version (e.g., 1.2.3). Leave empty to auto-detect."
        required: false
        type: string
      prerelease:
        description: "Mark GitHub Release as prerelease"
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*.*.*"

permissions:
  actions: write
  attestations: write
  checks: write
  contents: write
  deployments: write
  discussions: write
  id-token: write
  issues: write
  packages: write
  pages: write
  pull-requests: write
  repository-projects: write
  security-events: write
  statuses: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.12"

jobs:
  build_publish_release_docs:
    name: Build, Publish, Release, Docs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: release
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Determine version
        id: ver
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "push" ]]; then
            tag="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
            version="${tag#v}"
          else
            version="${{ inputs.version }}"
            if [[ -z "${version}" ]]; then
              if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
                version="$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
              elif [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
                version="$(python - <<'PY'
import re, pathlib
t = pathlib.Path('pyproject.toml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
m = re.search(r'(?m)^version\\s*=\\s*\"([^\"]+)\"\\s*$', t)
print(m.group(1) if m else '')
PY
)"
              else
                version=""
              fi
            fi
          fi
          if [[ -z "${version}" ]]; then
            echo "Unable to determine version. Provide inputs.version or push a v* tag." >&2
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "version=${version}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "tag=v${version}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org
          cache: npm

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          else
            npm install
          fi

      - name: Build (Node)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm run | grep -qE ' build'; then
            npm run build
          fi

      - name: Test (Node)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm run | grep -qE ' test'; then
            npm test
          fi

      - name: Install Python build tooling
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install build twine

      - name: Build (Python)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m build

      - name: Publish to npm
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' && secrets.NPM_TOKEN != '' }}
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm publish --access public

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages (npm)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm config set //npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken "${NODE_AUTH_TOKEN}"
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            scope="$(node -p "require('./package.json').name.startsWith('@') ? require('./package.json').name.split('/')[0] : ''")"
            if [[ -n "${scope}" ]]; then
              npm config set "${scope}:registry" "https://npm.pkg.github.com"
              npm publish
            fi
          fi

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        if: ${{ (hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '') && secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN != '' }}
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          twine upload dist/*

      - name: Create/Update tag (workflow_dispatch)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          if git rev-parse "${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            git tag -f "${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}"
          else
            git tag "${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}"
          fi
          git push origin -f "${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}"

      - name: Generate changelog (best-effort)
        id: changelog
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          prev_tag="$(git tag --sort=-creatordate | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | grep -v "^${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}$" | head -n 1 || true)"
          if [[ -n "${prev_tag}" ]]; then
            notes="$(git log --pretty=format:'- %s (%h)' "${prev_tag}..HEAD" | sed '/^$/d' || true)"
          else
            notes="$(git log --pretty=format:'- %s (%h)' | head -n 200 | sed '/^$/d' || true)"
          fi
          if [[ -z "${notes}" ]]; then
            notes="- Release ${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}"
          fi
          {
            echo "notes<<'EOF'"
            echo "${notes}"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}
          name: ${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}
          body: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.notes }}
          prerelease: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.prerelease || false }}
          generate_release_notes: true
          files: |
            dist/**
            **/*.tgz
            **/*.tar.gz
            **/*.zip

      - name: Update documentation (best-effort)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

          updated=0

          if [[ -f README.md ]]; then
            if grep -qE '(^|\s)Version:\s*' README.md; then
              perl -0777 -i -pe "s/(^|\\n)(Version:\\s*).*/\\1\\2${{ steps.ver.outputs.version }}/m" README.md && updated=1 || true
            fi
          fi

          if [[ -f docs/README.md ]]; then
            if grep -qE '(^|\s)Version:\s*' docs/README.md; then
              perl -0777 -i -pe "s/(^|\\n)(Version:\\s*).*/\\1\\2${{ steps.ver.outputs.version }}/m" docs/README.md && updated=1 || true
            fi
          fi

          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              jq --arg v "${{ steps.ver.outputs.version }}" '.version=$v' package.json > package.json.tmp && mv package.json.tmp package.json && updated=1 || true
            fi
          fi

          if [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            perl -0777 -i -pe "s/(?m)^version\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]+\"\\s*$/version = \"${{ steps.ver.outputs.version }}\"/g" pyproject.toml && updated=1 || true
          fi

          if [[ "${updated}" -eq 1 ]]; then
            git add -A
            if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
              git commit -m "docs: update for ${{ steps.ver.outputs.tag }}"
              git push origin HEAD:${{ github.ref_name }}
            fi
          fi

      - name: Deploy GitHub Pages (if docs site present)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('docs/**') != '' }}
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v4
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./docs
          force_orphan: true
